2604.13531.title: RiskWebWorld: A Realistic Interactive Benchmark for GUI Agents in E-commerce Risk Management
2604.13531.paper_summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents show strong capabilities for automating web tasks, but existing interactive benchmarks primarily target benign, predictable consumer environments. Their effectiveness in high-stakes, investigative domains such as authentic e-commerce risk management remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we present RiskWebWorld, the first highly realistic interactive benchmark for evaluating GUI agents in e-commerce risk management. RiskWebWorld features 1,513 tasks sourced from production risk-control pipelines across 8 core domains, and captures the authentic challenges of risk operations on uncooperative websites, partially environmental hijackments. To support scalable evaluation and agentic reinforcement learning (RL), we further build a Gymnasium-compliant infrastructure that decouples policy planning from environment mechanics. Our evaluation across diverse models reveals a dramatic capability gap: top-tier generalist models achieve 49.1% success, while specialized open-weights GUI models lag at near-total failure. This highlights that foundation model scale currently matters more than zero-shot interface grounding in long-horizon professional tasks. We also demonstrate the viability of our infrastructure through agentic RL, which improves open-source models by 16.2%. These results position RiskWebWorld as a practical testbed for developing robust digital workers.
2604.13531.paper_summary_zh: 圖形用戶界面（GUI）代理在自動化網絡任務方面顯示出強大的能力，但現有的互動基準主要針對良性、可預測的消費者環境。它們在高風險、調查性領域（如真實電子商務風險管理）中的有效性仍然未被充分探索。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了RiskWebWorld，這是第一個高度真實的互動基準，用於評估電子商務風險管理中的GUI代理。RiskWebWorld包含1,513個任務，這些任務來自於8個核心領域的生產風險控制管道，並捕捉在不合作網站上進行風險操作的真實挑戰，部分環境劫持。為了支持可擴展的評估和代理強化學習（RL），我們進一步構建了一個符合Gymnasium標準的基礎設施，將策略規劃與環境機制解耦。我們在多種模型上的評估顯示出顯著的能力差距：頂級通用模型的成功率為49.1%，而專門的開放權重GUI模型則幾乎完全失敗。這突顯了基礎模型的規模目前比零-shot介面基礎在長期專業任務中更為重要。我們還通過代理強化學習展示了我們基礎設施的可行性，這使開源模型的性能提高了16.2%。這些結果使RiskWebWorld成為開發穩健數字工作者的實用測試平台。
2604.13531.author: Renqi Chen et.al.
2604.13531.authors: Renqi Chen, Zeyin Tao, Jianming Guo, Jing Wang, Zezhou Xu, Jingzhe Zhu, Qingqing Sun, Tianyi Zhang, Shuai Chen
